title: Hawk-bat Independent Space Force
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Iron_Fist.jpg|thumb|right|The Hawk-bats, on a mission to Halmad to steal their ships]]
{{Quote|We'll be founding our own pirate band, Wraiths, and then assaulting a planetary system that Zsinj is courting—or should be, if he isn't. |[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], to [[Wraith Squadron]]|<ref name="X-Wing: Iron Fist">''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]''</ref>}}
The '''Hawk-bat Independent Space Force''', better known simply as the '''Hawk-bats''', were a covert front maintained by [[Wraith Squadron]] during their campaign against rogue [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]].

As the Hawk-bats, the Wraiths operated out of the abandoned [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] mine [[A3]] in the [[Halmad system/Legends|Halmad system]], and used the [[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|''Xiytiar''-class transport]] ''[[Sungrass]]'' to transport their stolen [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]]. The Hawk-bats committed several successful acts of [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] in and around the Halmad system, before getting the attention of Zsinj. The Hawk-bats then successfully infiltrated Zsinj's organization, joining in the warlord's [[Battle of Kuat (Hunt for Zsinj)|attack]] on the [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. They managed to help destroy ''[[Razor's Kiss]]'' and gathered a significant amount of useful information about the warlord.

==Members==
*General [[Garik Loran|Kargin]] (alias of [[Garik Loran]])
*Captain [[Dia Passik|Seku]] (alias of [[Dia Passik]])
*Lieutenant [[Kell Tainer|Dissek]] (alias of Kell Tainer)
*Lieutenant [[Kettch]] (alias of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]])
*[[Shalla Nelprin|Qatya Nassin]] (alias of [[Shalla Nelprin]])
*Morrt (alias of [[Voort saBinring]])
